rows.finalText: One workable lens for "What is the next right step in my calling" is Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. Past opens with Book (26), putting not everything is visible yet in focus and setting the emotional weather around the reading. Here, Book emphasizes private knowledge, research, what is not yet visible, and the need to learn before you declare certainty. Present turns on Anchor (35), bringing long-term commitment and steadiness to the hinge of the reading and asking for one careful adjustment. Anchor often points to the version of vocation that can actually be sustained, not just admired from a distance in your calling. Future closes with Coffin (8), and the directional message is release an outdated pattern gracefully when the pivot receives consistent attention. Here, Coffin emphasizes the part of the old path that has already finished. Book (26) with Anchor (35) show what most shapes the question of calling: a blend of knowledge and stability, asking you to research deeply and disclose responsibly while staying alert to staying anchored to obsolete goals. The spread turns on Anchor (35) more than any other card. Anchor often points to the version of vocation that can actually be sustained, not just admired from a distance in your calling. Book (26) with Anchor (35) keep emphasizing a blend of knowledge and stability, asking you to research deeply and disclose responsibly while staying alert to staying anchored to obsolete goals. Stabilize what matters and release dead weight so Coffin (8) can land as lived experience rather than just possibility.
